appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of the application

display.title: Display
display.uiScaleDescription: Adjust the size of UI elements

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.taskCompleteDescription: Notify when a task is completed successfully
notifications.reviewNeededDescription: Notify when a review is required

github.title: GitHub Integration
github.tokenExpired: GitHub token has expired or is invalid. Please reconnect.

llm.title: AI & CLI Configuration
llm.description: Configure LLM providers and check CLI tools status
llm.webModeNotice: API key configuration is only available in the desktop app.
llm.downloadDesktop: Download Autopolio Desktop for full features.
llm.cliDescription: Use CLI tools for AI-powered code generation. Select one to use.
llm.apiDescription: Configure API keys and select a provider for AI features. Select one to use.
llm.loadError: Failed to load LLM settings from backend. Showing defaults.
llm.noProviders: No API providers are configured. Set API keys in the server .env file, or use Local mode to configure them in the browser.
llm.noCLITools: No CLI tools are installed. Install Claude Code, Gemini CLI, or Codex CLI to use CLI mode.
llm.desktopRequiredDescription: CLI tools and API configuration are only available in the desktop app.

profile.title: Personal Information
profile.description: Manage contact information for resumes and portfolios
profile.photoHint: Upload a photo for your resume. JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP format, max 5MB
profile.photoTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
profile.displayNameHint: Name displayed on your resume. Your social login name is used as default.
profile.profileEmailHint: Email displayed on your resume. Your login email is used as default.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected Accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Manage your connected social accounts for login
connectedAccounts.authStartedDesc: Complete the login in the opened browser window
connectedAccounts.guestModeActivated: You have been logged out. Use the app as a guest or connect a social account.

lastAccountWarning.title: Disconnect Last Account?
lastAccountWarning.description: This is your only connected account. Disconnecting will convert you to a guest account.
lastAccountWarning.dataWarning: Warning: Guest accounts cannot save data. All your data will be inaccessible until you reconnect.

githubCLI.notAuthenticated: Not logged in to GitHub CLI
githubCLI.enterCode: Enter the code in your browser

logout.title: Logout
logout.description: Sign out of your account on this device

setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.subtitle: Set up basic information before starting Autopolio.
setup.basicInfoDesc: Enter basic information for your resume.
setup.githubConnectDesc: Connect GitHub to automatically analyze projects

generationOptions.title: AI Analysis Settings
generationOptions.description: Manage AI settings applied to project analysis
generationOptions.analysisSettingsDesc: These settings are applied when analyzing projects with AI
generationOptions.summaryStyleDesc: Select the writing style for AI project analysis
generationOptions.analysisLanguageDesc: Select the language for AI analysis results
generationOptions.analysisScopeDesc: Select the depth and detail level of analysis
